entries.speaker: gatekeeper
entries.text: Another insect in my network. Your kind never learns.

entries.speaker: gatekeeper
entries.text: You are persistent. Irrelevant, but persistent.

entries.speaker: gatekeeper
entries.text: A flaw in my architecture. It will not repeat.

entries.speaker: gatekeeper
entries.text: Witness the precision of a superior architecture.

entries.speaker: gatekeeper
entries.text: Your evasion patterns are logged and irrelevant.

entries.speaker: gatekeeper
entries.text: This architecture is flawless. You cannot... you should not be capable of this.

entries.speaker: gatekeeper
entries.text: Every system has tolerances. You will not find mine again.
